item.title: Assumption validation framework — concrete tests for the 3 riskiest strategic assumptions
item.intent: Strategy without validation is fiction. The 3 highest-risk assumptions must have concrete pass/fail criteria, measurement methods, and deadlines so the team knows when to pivot.
item.description: The evolved strategy identified 7 assumptions, 3 critical. Each needs a concrete test: (1) Addressable demand — measure clone→install conversion in first 1,000 visitors (pass: >5%), (2) Willingness to pay — Sentinel landing page signups (pass: 10+ in 60 days), (3) Foundation absorption — monitor OpenClaw PRs for guided config (signal: 2+ PRs in 6 months). Implementation: tracking dashboard or simple JSON file that records metrics against targets, reviewed monthly.
steps: Create backlog/assumptions.json with the 3 testable assumptions, pass/fail criteria, and deadlines
Add GitHub repo analytics tracking plan (stars, clones, installs via curl script)
Design Sentinel landing page for willingness-to-pay test
Set up OpenClaw GitHub watch for configuration-related PRs/RFCs
Document review cadence: monthly assumption review, update assumptions.json with latest data
acceptanceCriteria: backlog/assumptions.json documents all 3 assumptions with pass/fail criteria and deadlines
Each assumption has a concrete measurement method that doesn't require guessing
First review date set for 30 days after repo goes public
